calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment. No appearance by Defendant at Trial.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Brandon Tang, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant JENAHMARI YANGWAS.
Declaration of Diane Trittipoe pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant(s) as follows:
Principal $11,902.32
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $429.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $12,331.32
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Set For Trial On Jan-20-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
